translations.it: Questo è il mio amico Paul.
translations.pt: Este é o meu amigo Paul.
translations.el: Αυτός είναι ο φίλος μου, Πολ.
translations.sv: Det här är min vän Paul.
translations.ja: こちらは私の友人のポールです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ce contracted as c' with est (3rd person singular present of être) functioning as the copula introducing the predicate nominal.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), masculine singular, modifying ami.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the predicate nominal (mon ami Paul) after the copula.
Proper noun in apposition to ami, specifying the identity of the friend.

sentences.target: Je vois mon ami au café.

translations.fr: Je vois mon ami au café.
translations.en: I see my friend at the café.
translations.es: Veo a mi amigo en la cafetería.
translations.de: Ich sehe meinen Freund im Café.
translations.it: Vedo il mio amico al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在咖啡馆看到了我的朋友。
translations.yue: 我喺咖啡店見到我個朋友。
translations.ru: Я вижу своего друга в кафе.
translations.he: אני רואה את החבר שלי בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy bạn tôi ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik zie mijn vriend in het café.
translations.uk: Я бачу свого друга в кафе.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े में अपने दोस्त को देख रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βλέπω τον φίλο μου στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Jeg ser vennen min på kafeen.
translations.id: Saya melihat teman saya di kafe.
translations.sv: Jag ser min vän på kaféet.
translations.da: Jeg ser min ven på caféen.
translations.ja: カフェで友だちを見かけました。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 1st person singular; selects a direct object (mon ami) and a locative PP (au café).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), masculine singular, modifying ami.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of vois.
Contraction of the preposition à and the masculine singular definite article le; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun; object of the contracted preposition au in the locative PP.

sentences.target: Tu téléphones à ton ami ce soir.

translations.fr: Tu téléphones à ton ami ce soir.
translations.en: You are calling your friend tonight.
translations.es: Vas a llamar a tu amigo esta noche.
translations.de: Du rufst heute Abend deinen Freund an.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚给你的朋友打电话。
translations.yue: 你今晚會打畀你嘅朋友。
translations.ru: Ты позвонишь своему другу сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Vai ligar para o seu amigo hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ gọi cho bạn mình.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ти подзвониш своєму другу.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात अपने दोस्त को फोन करोगे।
translations.pl: Dzisiaj wieczorem zadzwonisz do swojego kolegi.
translations.el: Απόψε θα τηλεφωνήσεις στον φίλο σου.
translations.nb: I kveld ringer du vennen din.
translations.sv: I kväll ringer du din vän.
translations.da: I aften ringer du til din ven.
translations.ja: 今夜は友だちに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes an indirect object introduced by à (téléphoner à quelqu’un).
Preposition marking the indirect object of téléphones.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), masculine singular, modifying ami.
Common noun, masculine singular; indirect object of téléphones introduced by à.
Demonstrative determiner forming the temporal NP ce soir (‘this evening/tonight’).
Common noun; head of the temporal NP ce soir functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Elle cherche son ami au parc.

translations.fr: Elle cherche son ami au parc.
translations.en: She is looking for her friend at the park.
translations.es: Ella busca a su amigo en el parque.
translations.de: Sie sucht ihren Freund im Park.
translations.it: Lei cerca il suo amico al parco.
translations.yue: 佢喺公園度搵緊佢嘅朋友。
translations.ru: Она ищет своего друга в парке.
translations.pt: Ela está procurando seu amigo no parque.
translations.he: היא מחפשת את החבר שלה בפארק.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang tìm bạn của mình ở công viên.
translations.ar: هي تبحث عن صديقها في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Ze zoekt haar vriend in het park.
translations.uk: Вона шукає свого друга в парку.
translations.hi: वह पार्क में अपने दोस्त को ढूँढ रही है।
translations.pl: Ona szuka swojego kolegi w parku.
translations.el: Ψάχνει τον φίλο της στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Hun leter etter vennen sin i parken.
translations.sv: Hon letar efter sin vän i parken.
translations.ro: Ea își caută prietenul în parc.
translations.da: Hun leder efter sin ven i parken.
translations.ja: 彼女は公園で友だちを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object (son ami).
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular possessor), form used before a vowel; modifies ami.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of cherche.
Contraction of à + le; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the contracted preposition au.

Tu téléphones à ton ami ce soir.

en: I see my friend at the café.
You are calling your friend tonight.
She is looking for her friend at the park.
